lighting.shadow_character: Long, deep, and sharp shadows used as a graphic element

composition.focus_point: Tomato salad in the central main dish
composition.composition_rule: Diagonal lines, Pattern & Repetition, Frame within a Frame

texture.detail_rendering: Excellent texture rendering, maximized by hard light to emphasize details like tomato skin and sauce creaminess.

mood.tone: Fresh, vibrant, healthy, and bright Mediterranean summer brunch mood.

improvement_notes: For a high-end ad look, soften shadows with a large diffuser to enhance food details. Neutralize the white background and slightly boost primary colors for better subject separation. Simplify the composition into a 'Hero Cut' by removing distracting elements to focus solely on the main dish.
nano_banana_prompt: professional food photography of a shrimp aglio e olio pasta, flat lay composition from a slightly angled top-down view, styled on a textured white surface, served in a simple ceramic white bowl. Lighting: Bathed in bright, direct, hard natural sunlight from the top-left, casting long, sharp, dramatic shadows across the scene. Color & Mood: Vibrant and fresh color palette with warm golden tones, clean and airy mood, high contrast, razor-sharp details, shot on Kodak Portra 400 film aesthetic. Camera: 85mm lens, f/9, ultra-detailed, photorealistic.
